# Alfred

> Alfred is a personal AI coworker wired into your email, calendar, GitHub, and the tools you already use. It triages your inbox, briefs you every morning, and preps you for meetings — quietly, in the background. Single-user by design.

## Pages

- [Home](https://alfred.beauty/): Product overview — what Alfred does and why.
- [Get started](https://alfred.beauty/login): Sign in to Alfred.
- [Privacy policy](https://alfred.beauty/privacy-policy): How Alfred handles your data and connected-account access.
- [Terms of service](https://alfred.beauty/terms-of-service): Terms for using Alfred.

## More

- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/99Yash/alfred): The Alfred codebase.
